note: Sealed Capsule ECIES JS now wired in the web wallet (Fase Sealed-1.C-2). The C++ envelope motor (Fase Sealed-1.A) and the JS implementation produce byte-identical envelopes for the same fixed seeds — confirmed by tests/sealed_envelope_vectors.mjs against tests/sealed_envelope_fixture.cpp (12 pass / 0 fail across two vectors, including one whose recipient pubkey starts with 0x03 to expose the libsecp256k1-vs-noble parity-byte hash divergence). Web wallet now actually broadcasts Sealed Note and Sealed Structured Data when (a) chain height >= V13 (12000), (b) exactly one recipient, (c) recipient pubkey supplied, (d) hash160(pubkey) matches the recipient address. Sealed Document Reference still routes to sost-cli (needs file picker UI). Single-recipient only — multi-recipient sealed remains rejected. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO transaction wire format, NO sighash, NO node, NO miner, NO CLI in this push. Force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
